# openwrt-hotplug module
> OpenWrt Core Hotplug Events > **Extracted from:** default etc/hotplug.d/ scripts across the OpenWrt repository > **Note for LLMs:** Developers building apps use these scripts as templates.
> **Total Context:** ~1412 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for openwrt-hotplug that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~355 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for openwrt-hotplug when a larger context window is available. (~1497 tokens, l4-monolith)

(~1412 tokens, l2-source)
